reckoning.name: Reckoning
reckoning.description: Setup/Builder: A righteous strike that demands justice. Generates 15 Stamina and 1 Holy Pip.

radiant_flash.name: Radiant Flash
radiant_flash.description: Setup: Blinding light erupts from your shield. Applies [Blinded] and generates 1 Holy Pip.

holy_smite.name: Holy Smite
holy_smite.description: Payoff: Call down divine judgment. Consumes 3 Holy Pips to deal massive Magic damage.

consecration.name: Consecration
consecration.description: Payoff/AOE: Burn the ground with holy fire. Deals AOE Magic damage every tick for 4 ticks. Consumes 2 Holy Pips.

divine_grace.name: Divine Grace
divine_grace.description: Defense: Protect yourself with a halo of light. Reduces incoming damage by 30% and heals for 10% of total HP.

seal_of_justice.name: Seal of Justice
seal_of_justice.description: Defense: Bind a foe's actions. Reduces their speed and prevents mobility skills for 4 ticks.

pursuit_of_justice.name: Pursuit of Justice
pursuit_of_justice.description: Mobility: Rush toward a [Marked] or [Sluggish] target with divine speed.

lay_on_hands.name: Lay on Hands
lay_on_hands.description: Utility/Signature: A miracle that restores full health to an ally or self. Consumes all remaining Stamina.

paladin_physiology.name: Paladin Physiology
paladin_physiology.description: Passive: Shield of Faith. You gain 10% damage reduction from all sources and 15% increased healing received.
